data.body:
Super El Niño incoming. 

2015–2016 (blue line on the upper chart) was our most recent super El Niño. Our most recent El Niño, 2023–2024 (blue line on the lower chart)—with all the record-shattering average global surface and sea-surface temperatures—was only a moderate El Niño.

data.body:
Pet peeve I've noticed in inflation art: Characters getting fully inflated after eating just a portion of a Blimp Fruit.

Yoshi only gets that big in the games after eating the entire thing! It'd make more sense if taking a small bite would make you just a bit bloated in the stomach, right?

data.body: Like if you put both the SI units for T and E in pmol/L you'd be looking at something like 25000pmol/L being the norm for a cis man, so standard procedure is to normalise it to 25nmol/L because if you're looking at a man you're going to be primarily worried about his T.
